allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'ss|cj|scent|forecast|database' } | Select-Object FullName; "--- also checking common dev folders ---"; foreach \($p in @\("$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop","$env:USERPROFILE\\Documents","$env:USERPROFILE\\source\\repos","D:\\projects","D:\\dev","D:\\work"\)\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Get-ChildItem $p -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'ss|cj|scent|forecast|database' } | Select-Object FullName } })

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data.json'\); d.customers.forEach\(c=>console.log\(c.id, 'brands=', JSON.stringify\(c.brands\)\)\); console.log\('--- any product missing fields? ---'\); console.log\('products', d.products.length, 'orders', d.orders.length\);")
